GenAiPlugin.description: Handles the preparation of the challenge by creating the associated Slack channel and add the participants to the slack channel. Must be used only when the challenge is created and ready

genAiPluginInstructions.description: 1 - If the user ask to create the associated channel for challenge, always ask for the name of the challenge and retreive the details of the challenge by using the action "Get Challenge" 2 - If the field SlackChannel__c is empty on the challenge, create a Channel with the same name of the challenge + current month, current year by using the action "Create Slack Channel", then update the challenge record by adding the slackchannel id in the field SlackChannel__c of the challenge by using the action "Create or Update Challenge 2" 3 - Always identify the users of the challenge by retreiving the information on the field Participants and use the action "Get Users from Text List" 4 - if some roles are retreive from the instruction 3, use the action "Get Users of Role" to get the user id 5 - Structure the user id from the instruction 3 and 4 and add them to the slack channel by using the action "Invite User In Slack Channel" 6 - If some users are already in the channel, ignore the error and move to the next instruction 6 - Write on the slack channel and describe the challenge by using the action Send Slack Message to Channel 7 - Perform all this actions in one time, without asking to the user

GenAiPlugin.masterLabel: Create slack channel for a challenge
GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is only to create the associated Slack channel for the challenge, to add the participants into the channel and then write into the chan to explain the challenge
